project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite game application (board game)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` and confirm it completes (exit code 0). Note: there are pre-existing TS errors in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx and BattlePanel.tsx that are not related to our changes.
environment_constraints: No test suite available. Verification is limited to build passing.
key_patterns: CSS is in src/App.css (mostly one long line for minified section at top, then well-formatted sections for newer components). Components are in src/components/. Game types and constants (PROVINCE_COLORS, CLANS, etc.) in src/types/game.ts. Icon components in src/components/Icons.tsx.
directory_structure: Root: vite.config.ts, package.json, index.html. src/: App.css (all styles), components/ (React components), types/game.ts (constants), store/gameStore.ts (state), i18n/ (translations)
